docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CESARE, DAVE AS TO DEFENDANT THE BEACH CHALET, L.P.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-03-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE BEACH CHALET, L.P.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF DAVE CESARE. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT THE BEACH CHALET L.P. PARTIES NOTIFIED THE COURT THROUGH EMAIL THAT THE PARTIES HAVE SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON GRUBER ; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY CESARE, DAVE AS TO DEFENDANT THE BEACH CHALET, L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
